name: oh-my-zz
description: A focused engineering skill pack for idea refinement, specifications, brief dated change plans, formal planning, design interrogation, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, project-memory initialization with opt-in agent discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.

interface.shortDescription: Focused workflows for ideas, specs, brief and formal plans, handoffs, review-and-fix, opt-in project memory discovery, proposal-first architecture sync, reviews, and simplification.
